fromLocation.description: Location to copy the file from. This must be a Snowflake stage location.

main_file.description: Name + path of the file for the Notebook

comment.description: user comment associated to an object in the dictionary

default_version.description: The default version name of a file based entity.

query_warehouse.description: Warehouse against which the queries issued by the Streamlit app are run against

created_on.description: Date and time when the notebook was created.

database_name.description: Database in which the notebook is stored

schema_name.description: Schema in which the notebook is stored

owner_role_type.description: The type of role that owns the notebook

url_id.description: Unique ID associated with the notebook object.

title.description: User facing title of the Streamlit app or an Organization Profile

runtime_name.description: The runtime to run the Streamlit or Notebook on.  If this is not set, the warehouse is assumed

compute_pool.description: Compute pool name where the snowservice runs

external_access_integrations.description: List of external access integrations attached to this function

external_access_secrets.description: Secrets to be used with this function for external access

idle_auto_shutdown_time_seconds.description: Sets the time in seconds for when to shutdown an idle Notebook.

budget.description: Name of the budget if the notebook is monitored by a budget
